property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\app\Admin\product\21c\dbhomeXE in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\Admin\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.9-bin\apache-maven-3.9.9 in in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Program Files\Apache\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.9;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.0 in;C:\Program Files\Redis;C:\Users\Admin\kafka_2.13-3.9.1;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\18 in;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files
odejs;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Program Files\mongosh\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\cursoresources\app in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Kiro in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Roaming
pm;D:\Antigravity in;.

testcase.name: getNotifications_Success
testcase.system-out:
00:51:57.803 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.bytechat.controllers.NotificationControllerIntegrationTest]: NotificationControllerIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 00:51:58.223 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.bytechat.ByteChatApplication for test class com.bytechat.controllers.NotificationControllerIntegrationTest 00:51:58.450 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
